comments.comment: DEA was added because Plains notified AMEC that 160 tonnes of DEA are present at the Fort Saskatchewan site, for the purpose of removing sulphur from NGL. The DEA is circulated in the sulphur removal system and is reused onsite, thus it is not emitted, nor is it transferred offsite (either as waste or with product).
